Off Calendar Dec-04-2024 Off Calendar

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-09-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The Report of Status of Administration is taken off calendar. The court will not issue an Order to Appear. A new Status Hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for Dec-04-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. Counsel will be notified via email of the new status hearing date.

Judge: Hon. Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Lopez. Not Reported.

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-03-2024 Continued To Oct-09-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lon Lazar appeared by zoom for Leticia Di Lallo (administrator).

The court noted that there are a number of procedural issues. Mr. Lazar stated that he will be able to tackle those issues, that he attempted to file an amended status report, but it got rejected due to the manner in which it was titled, that he will be filing it again and requested a continuance. The Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration is continued to October 19, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Lopes. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-11-2023 Continued To Feb-28-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-21-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Jul-15-2002 is admitted to probate. Leticia Di Lallo is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Dec-11-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
